data.name: Sun City - Episode 1
data.detailed_description:
Languages


Joın Discord


關於此遊戲

After losing your family, you start living in another city, trying to hold on to life. In this city you make new friends and have sexual relationships. You can see different sequences by making choices. All characters and locations used in the game are fictional. And this game is for adults.

Sun City is a choice-focused, adult Visual Novel that features the following in its first chapter:

Over 1800 static images and 6+ animated scenes

Average playing time of 2 hours or more

An intriguing mystery

4 original songs

Chapter 1

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
